{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324001318A200E5AAD3F73EC37C29"}"},"total":267},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7615622264010425150","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的超好看，不是那种模板化的直播算命，里面的的人物都有血有肉，筠筠好，师姐好，师父好，家人好，天道坏的很，这次终于不是需要女主牺牲才能救世的故事了，而且一起反杀天道来救世，直接消灭制造问题的源头。师姐真的很好，当看到她为了送神女进入轮回而被所谓的神跟仙人搜刮身体内的所有的时候，觉得那些神跟仙真的很伪善","text_exts":[{"e":18,"s":14,"text":"直播算命","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%9B%B4%E6%92%AD%E7%AE%97%E5%91%BD&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742823983EC37C29%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227615622264010425150%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227534616252677884990%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%9B%B4%E6%92%AD%E7%AE%97%E5%91%BD%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773153227,"group_id":"7534616252677884990","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0dYDYqJxT19JMPu5UqOSA9oRIPVboLEo5dwqsq5jx43","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/2780fd551d7d4f01a4025e598e8aeddf~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776880221&x-signature=A4oCuwrqOhN3IClK6TTlTefg5x0%3D","user_id":"1785196379908779","user_name":"王德发发发发发发发！"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1785196379908779","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":72,"fan_ranklist_title":"铁杆粉","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1710491153,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7534616252677884990","book_info":{"abstract":"【算命+捉鬼+风水+大佬+单元剧+无CP】
师父说人间妖魔四起，楚筠就骑着自行车，背着自己的三把剑，悠哉悠哉的下山了。
一下山，就被举报了，可爱的剑剑被收，还说她搞封建迷信。
楚筠只能主动出击，提着红毛去警局捉僵尸，大发神威。
然后，成功拿回自己的剑。
公园摆摊算命，寻找有元人。
楚筠：“大爷，您的孙子谈恋爱了，谈三个女朋友。”
大爷：“我孙子才十一岁！”
......微信到账888元。
楚筠：“大妈，你女儿不会生娃，是因为男方没去看医生，大妈，你也被pua了。”
大妈飞奔去拉人算账。
楚筠：“......大妈，你忘给钱了。”
一卦接着一卦。
楚筠由小楚成功变成了楚大师。
......
算命，捉鬼打僵尸，顺便再拿只妖，下山的楚筠名气越来越响，师门也被她发扬光大了。
本文基调偏轻松，主要还是讲讲故事，欢迎大家观看。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/8fa6eff03b1e89bd5311c066f230e959","author":"殊宝","author_id":"","book_id":"7534616252677884990","book_name":"玄学：小师妹她超强却过分八卦","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#383850","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":267,"name":"现言脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=267&name=现言脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":520,"name":"大佬","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=520&name=大佬&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":867,"name":"捉鬼","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=867&name=捉鬼&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7534616257958511166","read_count":"39614","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"751670"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.2","serial_count":"358","tags":"现言脑洞,现代言情,无CP,大佬,搞笑轻松,捉鬼","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/867f135bee79ffe22727157cd1014132~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779466398&x-signature=KgT1qIYFa%2B06%2FiAD6pRZ9gRNQKQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4353705683725982","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"847"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324001318A200E5AAD3F73EC37C29"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读70小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":199804,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":253660,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":556},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7555759631210955545","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"🌈🌈好看好看，剧情很精彩，女主性格很搞笑，说话做事都很有趣，还是一个自信开朗活泼可爱的女孩子，还有点小傲娇👧🏻女主有时看不下去的时候宁愿被雷劈宁愿失去一点功德，也要帮助无辜的人出气，还会帮助可怜人，真的很有大爱了👧🏻但是一点也不圣母，不会上赶着帮助不尊重她的人，一点也不憋屈[大笑]期待后续的精彩内容[求爆更]

ed_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":38538,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":16077},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7544653443544367934","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"客观评价：我个人对这种玄学类题材的小说很挑，特别是最近大数据总给我推直播类玄学文，让我看的都千篇一律了，这是我刚找到的一本单元剧玄学题材的文，内容很新颖，为什么总是在我想追一本小说的时候确是连载的，目前是无CP的，女主很强，在里面几乎是无敌的存在，而且单元剧情也不憋屈，女主不圣母。让我看的很舒服啊，以后的剧情最好也无cp，不要搞个什么男主出来，在这之前我都没找到小说看，洋柿子里的小说我都看的差不多了，这本真的很出乎我意料，可是评分好像有点低，希望后续会涨到9分以上吧，我看小说一般都是看9分以上的小说，这种评分低的我都很少看，作者加油写，如果有读者看到我这条评论，那你可以放心追这本小说，因为真的很好看，没什么雷点，我不希望这本小说隐入人堆，希望更多的人看到这本小说，可以说，女主的人设我是很喜欢的。哎呀，文化有限，想不出其他能描述这本小说的词藻了，大家自己去看就知道了。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1756629410,"group_id":"7534616252677884990","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"人情世故就是价值交换","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxPUeM9CELdo7IvlmibHXFxqz6eam/yMYXPJn9y9mVNN","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/946cd3159a30496cbf64b19c9bcec944~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776880094&x-signature=x6iYI6a%2FuzUtdzMvcWGyrO1E2Ic%3D","user_id":"4501826497167379","user_name":"鹤风妤"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4501826497167379","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7534616252677884990","book_info":{"abstract":"【算命+捉鬼+风水+大佬+单元剧+无CP】
